messages.content: 尊敬的用户，非常抱歉给您造成不便。为了更好的解决您的问题，我们给出以下两个方案：1、如您在美国有可收货的地址，请您提供相关具体的收货地址，邮编，电话号码以及收件人信息，我们将新的猫厕所底座邮递至改地址。2、由于我们无法直接邮递至哥伦比亚，我们给您退还80美金已补偿您。请您告诉我们您的选择。给您造成诸多的不便，我们深表抱歉。您的满意是我们最大的追求，祝您生活愉快。        基于以上内容，写一封英语邮件

Dear Customer,

We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience caused. In order to better address your concern, we have two solutions for you:

Option 1: If you have a valid shipping address in the United States, please provide us with the specific delivery address, postal code, telephone number, and recipient information. We will arrange for the new cat litter box base to be shipped to that address.

Option 2: As we are unable to directly ship to Colombia, we would like to offer a refund of $80 as compensation. Please let us know your preferred option.

We deeply regret the inconveniences you have experienced. Your satisfaction is our utmost priority. We wish you a pleasant day.

Best regards,
尊敬的用户，我们收到了您的反馈。我们了解到您使用的是ipad版本。目前ipad版本是存在如此的情况，我们也正在优化此问题。另外如果比较介意，请您可以尝试使用手机进行查看。如有问题，请您随时与我们联系，祝您生活愉快！  基于以上内容，写一封英语邮件

Dear User,

Thank you for your feedback. We have received your inquiry regarding the iPad version. We understand that you are experiencing certain issues with it. Please be informed that we are currently working on optimizing the iPad version to address such concerns.

In the meantime, if you find it inconvenient, we suggest trying to access our service using a smartphone. This may provide a better browsing experience and alleviate the mentioned problem.

If you have any further questions or concerns, please feel free to contact us. We are here to assist you. We wish you a pleasant day!

Best regards,
尊敬的用户，我们收到了您的反馈。请您告知我们您使用的产品，并具体描述您所遇到的问题，如果有详细的视频描述您所出现的问题，那就更好了。并请您告知我们您的设备id（您可以在手机app里查询到）和SN码（您可以在机器底部查看到）。如果有任何问题，请随时与我们联系。祝您生活愉快      基于以上内容，写一封英语邮件

Dear User,

Thank you for reaching out to us. We have received your feedback and would appreciate some specific details to better understand and address the issue you are facing. 

Firstly, kindly let us know the specific product you are using. Additionally, please provide a detailed description of the problem you are encountering. If it is possible, a video demonstrating the issue would help us to comprehensively assess the situation.

Moreover, please provide us with your device ID, which can be found in the settings of your mobile app, as well as the SN code located at the bottom of the machine. This information will assist us in identifying the root cause of the problem more efficiently.

If you have any further questions or concerns, please do not hesitate to contact us. We are available to help you. Wishing you a pleasant day!

Best regards,
尊敬的用户，我们收到了您的反馈。请您提供相关的图片或者视频以描述您所遇到的问题。另外请您提供设备id（您可以在手机app里查询到）和sn码（机器底部可以查看到）这样我们可以更好的帮您解决问题。非常感谢您的配合与支持，祝您生活愉快！   基于以上内容，写一封英语邮件

Dear User,

Thank you for your feedback. We have received your inquiry and would greatly appreciate it if you could provide us with relevant images or videos to better understand the issue you are facing. These visual aids will help us in assessing and resolving the problem more effectively.

Furthermore, please provide us with the device ID, which can be found in the settings of your mobile app, as well as the SN code located at the bottom of the machine. This information will assist us in accurately identifying the specific device and providing you with the most appropriate solution.

Thank you for your cooperation and support. If you have any further questions or concerns, please feel free to contact us. We are here to assist you. Wishing you a pleasant day!

Best regards,
尊敬的用户，非常抱歉给您带来不便。我们收到物流方面的反馈，您的包裹目前滞留在您所在国家的海关，需要您联系海关进行清关。如有任何问题，请您联系我们。感谢您的配合与支持，祝您生活愉快     基于以上内容，写一封英语邮件

Dear User,

We sincerely apologize for any inconvenience caused. We have received an update from the logistics provider regarding your package. It is currently being held at the customs of your country and requires you to contact the customs authority for clearance.

If you have any questions or need further assistance, please do not hesitate to contact us. We appreciate your cooperation and support. Wishing you a pleasant day!

Best regards,
尊敬的用户，非常抱歉给您带来不便。目前，我们收到物流方的反馈，您的快递已经到底快递服务店，请您尽快前去收取。如有任何问题，请您随时与我们联系。祝您生活愉快    基于以上内容，写一封英语邮件

Dear User,

We sincerely apologize for any inconvenience caused. We have received an update from the logistics provider, and your parcel has arrived at the designated courier service store. We kindly request you to collect the package at your earliest convenience.

If you have any questions or concerns, please feel free to contact us. We are here to assist you. Wishing you a pleasant day!

Best regards,
尊敬的用户，非常抱歉给您带来不便。目前，我们想向您确认 是否收到设备。如有任何问题，请您随时与我们联系。祝您生活愉快 基于以上内容，写一封英语邮件

Dear User,

We sincerely apologize for any inconvenience caused. At present, we would like to confirm whether you have received the device. If you have any questions or concerns, please feel free to contact us. We are here to assist you. Wishing you a pleasant day!

Best regards,
尊敬的用户，非常抱歉给您带来许多的不便。我正向物流人员查询相关信息，有新的动态会反馈给您。请您放心，我一直都站在您这边，为您解决问题。感谢您的支持与配合。祝您生活愉快  基于以上内容，写一封英语邮件

Dear User,

We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience caused. I am currently in contact with the logistics personnel to gather the relevant information. As soon as there are any updates, I will provide you with the latest status. Please rest assured that I am here to assist you and resolve the issue. Thank you for your support and cooperation. Wishing you a pleasant day!

Best regards,
尊敬的用户，我们已经为您补发猫厕所底座。以下是物流单号，详情向您查看附件图片。祝您生活愉快！ 基于以上内容，写一封英语邮件

Dear User,

We have reissued the cat litter box base for you. Please find the attached image for the logistics tracking number and details. Should you have any further inquiries, please feel free to reach out to us. Wishing you a pleasant day!

Best regards,
尊敬的用户，我们收到您的反馈。请您按照图片所示的步骤进行操作。第一步，请您填写您需要注册用的邮箱，第二部，请设置您的登录密码，第三部，请点击next的按钮。如果您操作仍然遇到问题，请您录屏并发送给我们。如有任何问题，请您随时与我们联系，祝您生活愉快。  基于以上内容，写一封英语邮件

Dear User,

Thank you for your feedback. Please follow the steps shown in the attached image for the registration process. Step 1: Fill in the email address you wish to register with. Step 2: Set your login password. Step 3: Click the "Next" button.

If you encounter any issues during the process, kindly record a screen capture and send it to us. We are here to assist you with any questions or concerns. Wishing you a pleasant day!

Best regards,
尊敬的用户，感谢您的反馈。您可以拍一些照片或者视频来更详细的描述您的问题吗？给您造成不便，我们非常抱歉。如果有问题，请您随时与我们联系。祝您生活愉快  基于以上内容，写一封英语邮件

Dear User,

Thank you for your feedback. Could you please provide us with some photos or videos to provide a more detailed description of the issue you are encountering? We sincerely apologize for any inconvenience caused. If you have any questions or concerns, please feel free to contact us. Have a pleasant day!

Best regards,
尊敬的用户，感谢您的反馈。您所说的东西，是雪顶盖，是放在机器顶部用来装饰作用。他不使用也不影响机器的运作。如果有任何问题，请您随时与我们联系，祝您生活愉快。 基于以上内容，写一封英语邮件

Dear User,

Thank you for your feedback. The item you mentioned, the snow top cover, is used for decorative purposes on the top of the machine. Its absence does not affect the functioning of the machine. If you have any further questions or concerns, please feel free to contact us. We wish you a pleasant day!

Best regards,
尊敬的用户，非常感谢您的反馈。目前，由于非质量问题需要退货退款的情况，是需要您将设备寄回我们的仓库，并承担邮费。我想这邮费也不便宜，所以建议您可以保留设备，我们可以给您退20%的款项。您看这是否可以接受，如果有任何问题，您可以随时与我们联系。祝您生活愉快。 基于以上内容，写一封英语邮件

Dear User,

Thank you very much for your feedback. Currently, for non-quality related returns and refunds, we would require you to send the device back to our warehouse and bear the shipping cost. Considering the shipping cost may be significant, we would like to propose an alternative solution. Instead of returning the device, we can offer you a refund of 20% of the total amount. We hope this solution is acceptable to you. If you have any further questions or concerns, please feel free to contact us. We wish you a pleasant day!

Best regards,
请您断电重启尝试一下   基于以上内容，写一封英语邮件

Dear User,

We kindly request you to try performing a power cycle by unplugging the device and restarting it. This simple step can often resolve common issues. Please attempt this and let us know if the problem persists. 

If you have any further questions or concerns, please feel free to contact us. We are here to assist you. Wishing you a pleasant day!

Best regards,
尊敬的用户，我们已经收到您的反馈。请问您目前的宠物日记的视频时长是多久。另外您觉得多长时间合适呢？目前我已经将您的建议反馈给我们的产品，感谢您的建议和支持。祝您生活愉快  基于以上内容，写一封英语邮件

Dear User,

Thank you for your feedback. May we kindly ask what is the current duration of your pet diary videos? Additionally, we value your input on the ideal length of these videos. We have already forwarded your suggestions to our product team. We appreciate your valuable feedback and support.

If you have any further questions or concerns, please feel free to contact us. Wishing you a pleasant day!

Best regards,
尊敬的用户，感谢您的反馈。我们的猫厕所不支持连接5g的wifi，请您使用2.4g的wifi进行配网。如果有任何问题，请您随时与我们联系，祝您生活与。 基于以上内容，写一封英语邮件

Dear User,

Thank you for your feedback. We would like to inform you that our cat litter box does not support connection to a 5GHz Wi-Fi network. Please ensure that you are using a 2.4GHz Wi-Fi network for the setup process. 

If you have any further questions or concerns, please do not hesitate to contact us. We are here to assist you. Wishing you a delightful day!

Best regards,
尊敬的用户，感谢您的支持与反馈。根据我们的售后服务政策，您的情况需要进行退换处理。请您告诉我们以下重要信息：1、O-Sitter是否装过猫粮 2、您的购买渠道以及订单号 3、您目前设备所在的国家地区。请您务必告诉我们这些信息，以便我们后续的处理。如有任何问题，请您随时与我们联系，祝您生活愉快   基于以上内容，写一封英语邮件

Dear User,

Thank you for your support and feedback. According to our after-sales service policy, your situation requires a return and exchange process. Please provide us with the following key information:

1. Has the O-Sitter been used with cat food?
2. Your purchase channel and order number.
3. The current country/region where the device is located.

Please ensure you provide us with these details so that we can proceed with the necessary steps. If you have any further questions or concerns, please feel free to contact us. Wishing you a pleasant day!

Best regards,
